cases.name: index.html (A, sunset): SVG funnel mounts, orange 47 waiting + green 3 active, tickers #45/#46/#47, zero console errors
landing-d.html (B, dark Command Center): orange 73 + green 12 crisp on dark bg (theme-fixed from near-black)
landing-e.html (C, ambient dark): widget renders in right gutter beside hero stats, all values legible
body padding 280px pushes hero content away from right margin; widget sits in its own gutter (20px gap measured at 1600px viewport)
right-middle positioning only above 1280px; below: graceful fallback to bottom-right corner with 230px width
client-side invalid-email validation blocks 'not-an-email', error shown
server-side disposable-domain rejection surfaces 'Disposable email addresses aren\'t accepted'
valid email submit → OTP form visible, verification email sent (captured from harness), email form hidden
wrong OTP '000000' → 'Invalid or expired verification code', form stays on OTP step
correct OTP → success card 'YOU\'RE IN #48', waiting count live-updated, localStorage set, harness visitors=1
close button → widget hidden, reopen chip visible with pulsing green dot, body padding released
reopen chip → widget restored, body padding re-applied, success state preserved
BC-01 waiting=0 baseline: orange 47 (seed offset), 3 active (floor clamp), tickers #45/#46/#47 → next #48
BC-02 waiting=1 real visitor: 48 waiting, tickers shift to #46/#47/#48, next #49
BC-03 waiting=500: 500 at full 30px, active=42 passes floor, tickers #498/#499/#500
BC-04 waiting=9999: formatted '9,999' auto-shrinks to 24px font, tickers #9997..#9999, next #10000
BC-05 waiting=25000: fmtBig compaction returns '25k', active 1234 auto-shrinks to 16px
BC-06 active=100: 3-digit full-size 22px, fits narrow funnel bottom
BC-07 active=9999: formatted '9,999' shrinks to 16px, no overflow
BC-08 your_position=9999: join + verify → success card 'YOU\'RE IN #9999' in monospace, email echoed in reassurance copy
mobile 375px viewport: widget auto-falls to bottom-right corner (220px wide, right:12 bottom:12), body padding disabled below 1280px breakpoint
desktop 1600px viewport: right-middle positioning active, body padding 280px cleanly separates widget from hero chat dock
reload after verify → poll fetches your_position via ?email=, auto-renders success pane, no re-entry needed
backend 503 contract: 5 seeded users → POST /v1/auth/register returns {waitlist: true, cap: 5}
JS error-renderer: innerHTML set to 'Join the waitlist →' link + /?waitlist=1#cls-q-root href + localStorage email stored
static HTML check: banner div + dismiss btn + profile link + emoji + query check all present in dashboard.html source
inline script with ?welcome=waitlist → banner display flips to block, heading 'Welcome to CLS++ — you\'re in!', profile link /profile.html#security
dismiss click → banner hidden + history.replaceState strips '?welcome=waitlist' from URL
GET /admin/waitlist (200) → 3 seeded visitors (alice@48, bob@49, carol@50), stats + full config payload
admin HTML: sec-waitlist section, sidebar link, wl-tbody, wl-promote-btn, initWaitlistSection() all present
POST /admin/waitlist/promote (200) → invited=['invitee@real.com'], count=1, visitor status 'waiting'→'invited'
admin HTML: sec-testing section, test-run-btn, initTestingSection() all present
POST /admin/tests/waitlist/run (200, 5.7s) → pytest subprocess returns 34/34 passed, exit_code=0, cases serialized
GET /admin/tests/waitlist/history (200) → runs array with run_id/passed/total/pass_rate/total_runtime_ms
full chain: reset → join → OTP → verify (pos 48) → admin promote → invite email captured (64-char token, 2h TTL)
GET /v1/waitlist/accept?token=... → session created for invitee@real.com (email_verified=true, tier=free, is_admin=false)
post-activation: visitor row status='activated', activated_at set, invite_token_hash cleared, harness users=2

notes: Driven by Claude Preview browser tools (real Chromium) against the waitlist dev server.
v7.1.1 redesign: SVG funnel replaces the old panel card. Body padding-right: 280px on viewports >= 1280px so the widget sits in a clear right gutter (no chat-card overlap).
Theme-agnostic palette: orange ACCENT for waiting number, green for active number. Verified legible on both sunset (light) and command-center (dark) themes.
Full border-case matrix covered: waiting = {0, 1, 500, 9999, 25000}, active = {0, 100, 9999}, your_position = 9999.
